---
title: "Map Data"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    self-contained: false
---

```{ojs}
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// DATA — replace this block with a fetch() from your data.json once it's set up
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
data = [
  { name: "Location A", latitude: 38.58,  longitude: -121.49, status: "Active",   updated: "2024-04-01" },
  { name: "Location B", latitude: 37.77,  longitude: -122.41, status: "Inactive", updated: "2024-03-28" },
  { name: "Location C", latitude: 34.05,  longitude: -118.24, status: "Active",   updated: "2024-04-01" },
  { name: "Location D", latitude: 36.74,  longitude: -119.77, status: "Pending",  updated: "2024-03-30" }
]

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// When your data.json is ready, swap the block above for:
// data = await fetch("data.json").then(r => r.json())
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

Inputs.table(data)
```
